steps.clue: Unlock Pack-a-Punch and obtain the Gorgofex.
Recover the DNA vial and open the teleportation lab.
Order the four files by date and reboot the accelerator.
Charge the Gorgofex and clear the portal crystals.
Cleanse the fungal head and place it in the portal.
Build Franken-Klaus and complete his two terminal tasks.
Capture four floating items and activate the bio-aetheric portal.
Attune the Sentinel Artifact and complete both elevator vaults.
Choose a side and defeat the opposing boss.
